en.text: . God: or, The LORD is a jealous God, and a revenger, etc is furious: Heb. that hath fury
by him. abide: Heb. stand up
in him. strong hold: or, strength
For while they be folden together
. a wicked: Heb. a counsellor of Belial
, yet thus shall they be cut down
thee no more. Though: or, If they would have been at peace, so should they have been many, and so should they have been shorn, and he should have passed away cut down: Heb. shorn
from off thee, and will burst
concerning thee, that no more of thy name
of him that bringeth good tidings
thee; he is utterly cut off
. keep: Heb. feast the wicked: Heb. Belial
. He: or, The disperser, or, hammer
. the excellency of Jacob: or, the pride of Jacob as the pride, etc
. in scarlet: or, dyed scarlet flaming: or, fiery
, they shall justle one against another
. worthies: or, gallants defence: Heb. covering, or, coverer
. Huzzab: or, that which was established, or, there was a stand made led: or, discovered
, shall they cry; but none shall look back
. of old: or, from the days that she hath been look back: or, cause them to turn
. for: or, and their infinite store, etc pleasant: Heb. vessels of desire
Behold, I am against thee, saith
not; bloody: Heb. city of bloods
: the bright: Heb. the flame of the sword, and the lightning of the spear
Behold, I am against thee, saith
upon thee, and make thee vile
And it shall come to pass, that all they that look
? populous: or, nourishing, etc: Heb. No Amon
. thy helpers: Heb. in thy help
over thee: for upon whom hath not thy wickedness
